summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Creative Studio webapp. Backend APIs are functional with proper authentication. Frontend loads correctly with working theme toggle, responsive design, and proper route protection. Google Auth integration redirects correctly to Emergent Auth.

minor_issues.issue: CORS headers not properly returned in OPTIONS requests
minor_issues.impact: May cause issues with browser preflight requests in some scenarios

minor_issues.issue: Mobile menu toggle not found with data-testid
Login button may be slightly small for optimal mobile touch targets

passed_tests: Authentication protection on all protected endpoints
Landing page loads correctly with all elements
Google Auth login redirect to Emergent Auth

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (15/16 tests passed - minor mobile UX issues)
